title: Better Camel Breeding
description: Breed better and better camels just like with horses!
body: With this data pack, baby [camels](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Camel) will have their movement speed, dash distance, and maximum health determined based on its parents' stats and a random positive or negative modifier. This allows you to breed better and better camels just like with [horses]((https://minecraft.wiki/w/Horse))!
